name: Irish Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the softened cream cheese and butter together until well combined.
2. Gradually stir in the confectioners' sugar until a smooth mixture forms.
3. Shape the mixture into small bite-sized balls.
4. Roll each ball thoroughly in cinnamon.
5. Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
Of course, ensure that children wash their hands thoroughly before handling the ingredients. My step-children enjoy making this recipe!
